a:r.a:t: Next steps to validate the opportunity
Can be implemented with minimal risk.
Could conceivably be implemented but carries some risk.
Hard to see how it could be implemented without significant damage.
Can be implemented with minimal obstacles.
Can be implemented but some complexity to be solved.
Hard to implement as major complexities to overcome.
Unlikely to implement as complexities are unsolvable.
headers and text boxes aligned with Diligence+ gridlines
